markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content priorities and manage the GrowthX team transition.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New GrowthX Team:** Vivek (Account Manager) and Ade (Content Creator) are taking over. Carrie will ensure a smooth handover, including a joint call in early 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** Prioritize articles on "texting" and SMS, as data shows this topic attracts more ICP visitors than current product-focused content.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [**Content Refresh:** Update high-performing articles with outdated 2025 data to protect their CTR. "Employee notification systems" and "communicating while on leave" are the first two.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [**Competitive Content:** Monitor Staffbase's recent organic gains. A key differentiator is Yourco's easy integration vs. Staffbase's full-platform replacement model.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Team Transition

  - [GrowthX is restructuring to create dedicated roles: Account Managers (client relationship) and Content Creators (content execution).](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [**New Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
      - [**Account Manager:** Vivek](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
      - [**Content Creator:** Ade (replacing Joe, who was promoted)](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [**Handover Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
      - [Carrie will ensure a smooth transition, staying involved through December.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
      - [The first 2026 call will include Carrie, Jessica, and Vivek to align on workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=2012.0)
      - [Vivek will propose a new call time to resolve a scheduling conflict.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=2096.0)
  - [**Strategic Oversight:**](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
      - [Directors (e.g., Kyle) will provide on-demand strategic input, moving from fixed monthly calls to a sprint-based model.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**Organic Traffic:** Up 95% since August, driven by strong performance in "open enrollment," "scheduling call-offs," and "templates & surveys."](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic:** Steady growth, but a recent spike from Perplexity and ChatGPT is unexplained.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** Could be a test by the LLMs or a result of specific content.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
      - [**Challenge:** GA4's referral data is too high-level for deep analysis. GrowthX's new analytics product (Q1 2026) should provide better data.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [**Competitive Landscape:**](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [Staffbase is gaining organic traction, likely from new AI-native content and self-referential articles.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [**Yourco Differentiator:** Position Yourco as an easy-to-implement add-on that integrates with existing HRIS/ERP systems, contrasting with Staffbase's full-platform replacement model.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)

### Content Plan & Priorities

  - [**Content Refresh:** Update high-performing articles with outdated 2025 data to protect their CTR.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
      - [**Priority 1:** "Employee notification systems"](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [**Priority 2:** "Communicating while on leave"](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [**New Content Focus:** Shift strategy to prioritize "texting" and SMS-related topics.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Data shows this topic attracts more ICP visitors than current product-focused content.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [**Examples:** "Texting and online intelligence," "SMS for your frontline team."](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [**Multilingual Onboarding Articles:**](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [**Plan:** Consolidate all except the Spanish version into one "master" article.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The other language versions have poor indexing and low traffic. The Spanish article performs well and should be kept separate.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [**Future Idea:** Convert the consolidated article into a downloadable checklist to improve lead generation.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [**Product Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Comparative content is on hold until new product pages are live.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
      - [**Launch Timeline:** "Frontline intelligence" page launches mid-December, followed by "HRIS integrations" and "enterprise bridge."](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
      - [Deliver remaining articles for the next two weeks by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
      - [Add "employee notification systems" and "communicating while on leave" to the content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [Consolidate multilingual onboarding articles (excluding Spanish) into one "master" article.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [Schedule a joint handover call for early 2026 with Carrie, Jessica, and Vivek.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=2012.0)
      - [Propose a new recurring call time to Jessica.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=2096.0)
  - [**Jessica:**](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
      - [Launch the "Frontline intelligence" product page by mid-December.](https://fathom.video/share/E_z2RJmWdAmUyUTkuFtPxWJeE1nWzB9x?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
